implicitConnectors.notes: LF is the short connector bridging taxiways L and F. Authorized implicitly only when the controller routes L adjacent to F (TAXI L F / TAXI F L).
Q is the connector bridging taxiway A and the B1 stub; A and B1 do not meet directly. Authorized implicitly only when the controller routes A adjacent to B1 (TAXI A B1 / TAXI B1 A).

blockedTurns.notes: L/F south apex: no direct sharp turn between L and F. Aircraft use the LF connector instead, so the apex corner is never routed and its fillet arc is not drawn. The two middle points are the same apex vertex on L/F.
